printed.name: Shoulder Stretch Extension
printed.setup:
Standing facing back to Ladder Barrel, arms straight, shoulder width apart (as close as possible), hands placed on ladder, body on diagonal line
Note: Placing hands closer together on ladder will intensify stretch

movement.inhale: Bend legs, flex hips, extend shoulders, lowering trunk until parallel to ladder
movement.exhale: Hold position for 3 -5 breathes, straighten legs, lift trunk, return to start position

cues: Engage back extensors to avoid tucking pelvis
